name: Archer
desc: Despair plays in cycles between the past and future. Countless ideals were incinerated before that red garment. Yet, do not let this smear of ashes fool you —\nShould someone create a phantasmal sweet dream under the guise of false ideals, then he will burn again, facing down the hypocrites of the world till the very end.\nNo matter where he is, he always remains the steadfast champion of justice.

1.name: The Unreached Dream
1.desc: After using Skill <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> time(s) within one turn, recovers <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Skill Point(s) for allies.

2.name: The Unfulfilled Happiness
2.desc: When using Ultimate, reduces the enemy target's Quantum RES by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, and applies Quantum Weakness to it, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

3.name: The Untamed Will
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: The Unsung Life
4.desc: Increases the Ultimate DMG dealt by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

5.name: The Nameless Watch
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: The Endless Pilgrimage
6.desc: When the turn starts, recovers 1 Skill Point for allies. The maximum number of stacks allowed for the DMG boost effect provided by this unit's Skill increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>. The Skill DMG dealt ignores <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of DEF.

101501.name: Kanshou and Bakuya
101501.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of <unbreak>Archer's</unbreak> ATK to one designated enemy.
101501.simple_desc: Deals minor Quantum DMG to one designated enemy.

101502.name: Caladbolg II: Fake Spiral Sword
101502.desc: Enters the "Circuit Connection" state. Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of <unbreak>Archer's</unbreak> ATK to one designated enemy. After using Skill in the "Circuit Connection" state, the current turn does not end, and the DMG dealt by <unbreak>Archer's</unbreak> Skill increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>. This effect can stack up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> time(s), lasting until he exits the "Circuit Connection" state. After actively using Skill <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> time(s) or when Skill Points are insufficient to use Skill again, exits the "Circuit Connection" state. After all enemy targets have been defeated in each wave, exits the "Circuit Connection" state.
101502.simple_desc: Enters the "Circuit Connection" state. Deals massive Quantum DMG to one designated enemy. During the "Circuit Connection" state, <color=#f29e38ff>the current turn does not end after using his Skill</color>, and the <color=#f29e38ff>DMG dealt by <unbreak>Archer's</unbreak> Skill</color> increases. When Skill Points are insufficient to use Skill again, exits the "Circuit Connection" state.

101503.name: Unlimited Blade Works
101503.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of <unbreak>Archer's</unbreak> ATK to one designated enemy and gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> point(s) of Charge, up to a maximum of <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>.
101503.simple_desc: Deals massive Quantum DMG to one designated enemy and gains Charge.

101504.name: Mind's Eye (True)
101504.desc: After <unbreak>Archer's</unbreak> teammates attack enemy targets, <unbreak>Archer</unbreak> consumes 1 Charge and immediately launches <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> on the primary target, dealing Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of <unbreak>Archer's</unbreak> ATK and recovering 1 Skill Point. If the target is defeated before this <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> is launched, the <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> will be directed at one random enemy instead.
101504.simple_desc: After a teammate uses an attack, <unbreak>Archer</unbreak> consumes 1 Charge and launches <color=#f29e38ff><u>Follow-Up ATK</u></color> on the primary target, dealing Quantum DMG and <color=#f29e38ff>recovering 1 Skill Point</color>.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

101506.name: Attack
101506.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

101507.name: Clairvoyance
101507.desc: Immediately attacks enemies. After entering combat, deals Quantum DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of <unbreak>Archer's</unbreak> ATK to all enemies and gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> point(s) of Charge.
101507.simple_desc: Immediately attacks enemies. After entering combat, deals Quantum DMG to all enemies and gains Charge.

101509.name: End
101509.desc: Exits "Circuit Connection" state and ends the turn.

1.point_desc: When <unbreak>Archer</unbreak> is on the field, increases the maximum Skill Point limit by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>.
When <unbreak>Archer</unbreak> enters combat, gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> point(s) of Charge.

After allies gain a Skill Point, if there are <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> Skill Points or more, increases <unbreak>Archer's</unbreak> CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
